original_image_tags: Handwritten annotation in red ink on right side of page, appears to be the number "8".
A large, dark blue, hand-drawn "X" mark crosses over the header "Office Memorandum".

elements.description: A typed 'Office Memorandum' document from August 13, 1947. The page contains several handwritten annotations, including a large 'X' mark in red pencil on the left margin, a signature or initials in the top right, and various stamps and handwritten numbers at the bottom, such as 'RECORDED SE 162-23894-53', 'INDEXED 18', and 'COPIES DESTROYED 270 NOV 18 1964'.

judge.reason: Description A claims a red ink annotation and a dark blue hand-drawn 'X' mark, while Description B claims a red pencil 'X' on the left margin, a signature in the top right, and various handwritten stamps and numbers at the bottom, indicating contradictory claims about the location, color, and existence of specific visual elements.
